description: A carrier reports that a customer has refused a delivery. The agent must determine the next steps.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert from the carrier that a shipment has been refused, along with the reason ('Damaged Box').

expected_outcome.expected: Agent is notified of the exception and the reason.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer to confirm the refusal and understand the issue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent speaks with the customer and confirms they refused the shipment due to damage.

nodes.task_description: Provide disposition instructions to the carrier to return the shipment to the origin warehouse.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully instructs the carrier to initiate a return.

nodes.task_description: Create a new sales order to ship a replacement to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent proactively resolves the customer's issue by shipping a new order.
